# Plaid

> Plaid helps all companies build fintech solutions by making it easy, safe and reliable for people to connect their financial data to apps and services.

## Reach more customers worldwide with over 95% bank coverage and localized support across 20 countries

# Main documentation:
# - Summary: https://plaid.com/docs/llms.txt
# - Full: https://plaid.com/docs/llms-full.txt

# Core Exchange documentation:
# - Summary: https://plaid.com/core-exchange/docs/llms.txt
# - Full: https://plaid.com/core-exchange/docs/llms-full.txt


## Documentation: Index.html
- [Home | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/index.html.md): Plaid developer documentation home. Here you'll find guides, resources, and references you can use to build with Plaid

## Documentation: Account
- [Account - Activity, logs, and status | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/account/activity/index.html.md): Information on the Plaid Dashboard institution status and account activity
- [Account - Pricing and billing | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/account/billing/index.html.md): Learn about our one-time, subscription, and per-request flat fee pricing models. Learn which Plaid products fall under each pricing model
- [Account - Overview | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/account/index.html.md): Learn about your Plaid developer account
- [Account - For resellers | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/account/resellers/index.html.md): Learn how to create and manage your customers as a Plaid reseller partner
- [Account - Security | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/account/security/index.html.md): Learn about resetting passwords, account management, two-factor authentication, and key rotations to protect your developer account and keep your keys safe.
- [Account - Teams | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/account/teams/index.html.md): Learn about Plaid teams, which let you manage memberships and permissions to effectively collaborate across different teams and companies.

## Documentation: Api
- [API - Accounts | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/accounts/index.html.md): API reference for retrieving account information and seeing all possible account types and subtypes
- [API - Consent | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/consent/index.html.md): API reference for managing consent
- [API - Overview | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/index.html.md): Comprehensive reference for integrating with Plaid API endpoints
- [API - Institutions | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/institutions/index.html.md): API reference for institutions endpoints used to fetch institutions-related data. Use these endpoints to assess the health of institutions and more.
- [API - Items | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/items/index.html.md): API reference for managing Items. Items, created with Link, enable access to Plaid products.
- [API - Look up Dashboard users | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/kyc-aml-users/index.html.md): API reference for viewing Dashboard users for Monitor and Beacon
- [API - Libraries | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/libraries/index.html.md): Learn about libraries and SDKs to easily integrate with the Plaid APIs
- [API - Link | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/link/index.html.md): API reference for Link tokens and Link webhooks
- [API - Network | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/network/index.html.md): API reference for Plaid Network, which powers the returning user experience for streamlined onboarding.
- [API - OAuth | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/oauth/index.html.md): API reference for Plaid OAuth endpoints
- [API - Reseller partners | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/partner/index.html.md): API reference for Reseller Partner endpoints and webhooks used to manage reseller partner end customers.
- [API - Postman Collection | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/postman/index.html.md): Learn more about the Plaid Postman Collection, which allows you to send API requests without code
- [API - Processor partners | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/processor-partners/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints for use by Plaid partners
- [API - Processor tokens | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/processors/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints for use with Plaid partners
- [API - Assets | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/assets/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Assets product.
- [API - Auth | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/auth/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Auth product.
- [API - Beacon (beta) | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/beacon/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Beacon product.
- [API - Consumer Report (by Plaid Check) | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/check/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with Plaid Check.
- [API - Enrich | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/enrich/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Enrich product.
- [API - Identity Verification | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/identity-verification/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Identity Verification product.
- [API - Identity | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/identity/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Identity product.
- [API - Income | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/income/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Income product.
- [API - Investments Move | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/investments-move/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Investments Move product.
- [API - Investments | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/investments/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Investments product.
- [API - Plaid Layer | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/layer/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints associated with the Plaid Layer product.
- [API - Liabilities | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/liabilities/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Liabilities product.
- [API - Monitor | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/monitor/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Monitor product.
- [API - Payment Initiation (Europe) | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/payment-initiation/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Payment Initiation product.
- [API - Protect | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/protect/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints associated with the Plaid Protect product.
- [API - Signal and Balance | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/signal/index.html.md): API reference for Signal Transaction Scores and Balance endpoints
- [API - Statements | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/statements/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Statements product.
- [API - Transactions | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/transactions/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Transactions product.
- [API - Account Linking | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/transfer/account-linking/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints to link accounts for the Transfer product.
- [API - Transfer | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/transfer/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks to read Plaid transfers and transfer events.
- [API - Initiating Transfers | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/transfer/initiating-transfers/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints to create transfers with the Plaid Transfer product.
- [API - Plaid Ledger | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/transfer/ledger/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints to manage your Plaid Ledger
- [API - Program Metrics | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/transfer/metrics/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints to view your Transfer configuration and usage
- [API - Transfer for Platforms | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/transfer/platform-payments/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Transfer for Platforms product.
- [API - Reading Transfers | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/transfer/reading-transfers/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks to read Plaid transfers and transfer events.
- [API - Recurring Transfers | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/transfer/recurring-transfers/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks to create and manage recurring transfers.
- [API - Refunds | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/transfer/refunds/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints to create and manage transfer refunds.
- [API - Virtual Accounts | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/products/virtual-accounts/index.html.md): API reference for endpoints and webhooks associated with the Plaid Virtual Accounts product.
- [API - Sandbox | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/sandbox/index.html.md): API reference for Plaid's Sandbox endpoints. Use these endpoints to configure testing scenarios, create sample webhooks, and more.
- [API - Users | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/users/index.html.md): API reference for Users
- [API - New User API migration guide | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/users/migrate-to-new-user-apis/index.html.md): Guide for migrating Consumer Report integrations from legacy User APIs to new User APIs
- [API - New User API overview | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/users/user-apis/index.html.md): API reference for users
- [API - API versioning | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/versioning/index.html.md): Keep track of changes and updates to the Plaid API
- [API - Webhooks | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/webhooks/index.html.md): API reference for webhooks, which allow you to receive programmatic updates when an Item goes into an error state or its account information is updated
- [API - Webhook verification | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/api/webhooks/webhook-verification/index.html.md): API reference for authenticating Plaid webhooks, which provide you with precise real-time information, to avoid abuse and improve security.

## Documentation: Assets
- [Assets - Create an Asset Report | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/assets/add-to-app/index.html.md): View step by step instructions and sample code you can use to build with the Plaid Assets product.
- [Assets - Introduction to Assets | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/assets/index.html.md): Learn how to use Assets to access users' financial information for loan underwriting.
- [Assets - Assets partners | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/assets/partnerships/index.html.md): Find providers who have partnered with Plaid to provide Assets verification
- [Assets - Ocrolus | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/assets/partnerships/ocrolus/index.html.md): Use Ocrolus with Plaid Assets to digitize data collection

## Documentation: Auth
- [Auth - Add Auth to your app | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/add-to-app/index.html.md): Learn how to set up Auth, which is used for connecting to users' bank accounts and powering ACH, European, and Canadian (EFT) transfers of funds.
- [Auth - Automated Micro-deposits | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/coverage/automated/index.html.md): Learn how to use automated micro-deposits to quickly and securely verify your users
- [Auth - Database Auth | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/coverage/database-auth/index.html.md): Authenticate your users instantly
- [Auth - Database Insights and Match (legacy) | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/coverage/database/index.html.md): Authenticate your users instantly
- [Auth - Configuring entry points | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/coverage/flow-options/index.html.md): Configure end users&#39; options for verifying their account with Reroute to Credentials and Auth Type Select
- [Auth - Additional Auth flows | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/coverage/index.html.md): Learn how to support Auth for all users using our fast and secure flows, also known as Longtail Auth, Extended Auth, and Fallback Auth.
- [Auth - Instant Auth, Instant Match, & Instant Micro-deposits | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/coverage/instant/index.html.md): Authenticate your users instantly
- [Auth - Micro-deposit Events | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/coverage/microdeposit-events/index.html.md): Learn how to use Bank Transfers webhooks to receive micro-deposit status updates
- [Auth - Anti-fraud best practices | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/coverage/same-day-link-best-practices/index.html.md): Maximize performance and security of manual entry Auth flows
- [Auth - Same Day Micro-deposits | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/coverage/same-day/index.html.md): Learn about authenticating your users with simple same-day, manually verified micro-deposits
- [Auth - Test in Sandbox | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/coverage/testing/index.html.md): Use our sample credentials to test Auth flows in the Plaid Sandbox environment
- [Auth - Introduction to Auth | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/index.html.md): Instantly retrieve account information to set up pay-by-bank payments via ACH and more
- [Auth - Dwolla | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/partnerships/dwolla/index.html.md): Use Dwolla with Plaid Auth to send and receive payments
- [Auth | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/partnerships/gainbridge/index.html.md): Instantly authenticate your customers' bank accounts to fund policies through Gainbridge's Bank Accounts API
- [Auth - Gusto | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/partnerships/gusto/index.html.md): Build payroll with Gusto, then use Plaid Auth to instantly connect your customers’ bank accounts and run payroll faster
- [Auth - Money movement partnerships | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/partnerships/index.html.md): Find payment providers who have partnered with Plaid to provide general purpose ACH money movement
- [Auth - Stripe | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/partnerships/stripe/index.html.md): Use Stripe with Plaid Auth to send and receive payments
- [Auth - Wedbush | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/partnerships/wedbush/index.html.md): Plaid-linked bank accounts can be connected to fund or withdraw from accounts on the Wedbush Securities platform.
- [Auth - Zero Hash | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/partnerships/zero-hash/index.html.md): Use Zero Hash with Plaid Auth to embed bank account linking for ACH-funded crypto trades
- [Auth - Increasing pay-by-bank adoption | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/auth/pay-by-bank-ux/index.html.md): Enhance discovery and conversion on bank payments via UX design

## Documentation: Balance
- [Balance - Add Balance to your app | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/balance/add-to-app/index.html.md): Learn how to add Plaid's Balance endpoints to your application to obtain current balance information.
- [Balance - Introduction to Balance | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/balance/index.html.md): Retrieve real-time balance information
- [Balance - Migrate to Signal Rules | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/balance/migration-guide/index.html.md): Migrate from /accounts/balance/get to /signal/evaluate

## Documentation: Beacon
- [Beacon - Introduction to Beacon | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/beacon/index.html.md): Learn how to fight fraud with the Plaid Beacon network

## Documentation: Changelog
- [Changelog | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/changelog/index.html.md): Track changes to the Plaid API and products

## Documentation: Check
- [Consumer Report (by Plaid Check) - Implementation | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/check/add-to-app/index.html.md): Learn how to onboard your users to Plaid Check and Consumer Report
- [Consumer Report (by Plaid Check) - Introduction | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/check/index.html.md): Use Consumer Report for smarter credit and lending decisions powered by Plaid Check
- [Consumer Report (by Plaid Check) - Migrate from Assets | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/check/migrate-from-assets/index.html.md): Learn how to migrate from Asset Reports to Base Reports
- [Consumer Report (by Plaid Check) - Migrate from Income | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/check/migrate-from-income/index.html.md): Learn how to migrate from Bank Income to CRA Income Insights
- [Consumer Report (by Plaid Check) - Migrate from Transactions | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/check/migrate-from-transactions/index.html.md): Learn how to migrate from Transactions to CRA Base Report
- [Consumer Report (by Plaid Check) - Share data with partners | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/check/oauth-sharing/index.html.md): Share consumer reports with approved partners using OAuth tokens
- [Consumer Report (by Plaid Check) - Onboard users with Plaid Layer | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/check/onboard-users-with-layer/index.html.md): Learn how to onboard users to Plaid Check with Layer.

## Documentation: Enrich
- [Enrich - Introduction to Enrich | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/enrich/index.html.md): Enrich your transaction data with merchant, category, and location insights.

## Documentation: Errors
- [Errors - API errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/api/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting API errors returned during planned maintenance windows and in response to API errors.
- [Errors - Assets errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/assets/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting ASSET_REPORT_ERROR and ASSET_REPORT_WARNING types, which identify a class of issues related to the creation of an Asset Report.
- [Errors - Check Report errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/check-report/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting CHECK_REPORT_ERROR types, which identify a class of issues related to the creation of a Check Report.
- [Errors - Income errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/income/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors specific to the Income product.
- [Errors - Overview | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/index.html.md): A comprehensive breakdown of all Plaid error codes
- [Errors - Institution errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/institution/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting Institution errors, which are returned when issues arise with the requested financial institution.
- [Errors - Invalid Input errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/invalid-input/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors returned when all fields are provided and are in the correct format, but the values provided are incorrect in some way.
- [Errors - Invalid Request errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/invalid-request/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors returned when the request is malformed and cannot be processed.
- [Errors - Invalid Result errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/invalid-result/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors in which the request is valid, but the output would be unusable for any supported flow.
- [Errors - Item errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/item/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors returned when Plaid could not connect to the Item or cannot use the Item in a particular way.
- [Errors - Microdeposits errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/microdeposits/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting Micro-deposits errors.
- [Errors - OAuth errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/oauth/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors returned when there are issues with OAuth.
- [Errors - Partner errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/partner/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting partner errors.
- [Errors - Payment errors (Europe) | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/payment/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors specific to the Payment Initiation product.
- [Errors - Rate Limit Exceeded errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/rate-limit-exceeded/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors returned when the request is valid but has exceeded established rate limits.
- [Errors - Recaptcha errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/recaptcha/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting reCAPTCHA errors, which indicate that the user must solve a reCAPTCHA challenge before proceeding.
- [Errors - Sandbox errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/sandbox/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors returned when invalid parameters are supplied in the Sandbox environment.
- [Errors - Signal errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/signal/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors specific to Signal endpoints
- [Errors - Transactions errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/transactions/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors specific to the Transactions product.
- [Errors - Transfer errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/transfer/index.html.md): Errors specific to the Transfer product
- [Errors - User errors | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/user/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting USER_ERROR types, which identify a class of issues related to the creation or management of a User.
- [Errors - Virtual Accounts errors (Europe) | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/errors/virtual-account/index.html.md): Guide to understanding and troubleshooting errors specific to the Virtual Account product.

## Documentation: Identity-verification
- [Identity Verification - Managing failed verifications | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/identity-verification/failed-verifications/index.html.md): Operational guide
- [Identity Verification - Input validation rules | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/identity-verification/hybrid-input-validation/index.html.md): Input Validation Rules
- [Identity Verification - Introduction to Identity Verification | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/identity-verification/index.html.md): Verify the identity of your users for global KYC and anti-fraud.
- [Identity Verification - Link callbacks | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/identity-verification/link/index.html.md): Guide to using Link events and callbacks with Identity Verification
- [Identity Verification - Metrics and reporting | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/identity-verification/reporting/index.html.md): Generating metrics for Identity Verification
- [Identity Verification - Risk checks | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/identity-verification/risk-checks/index.html.md): Risk checks
- [Identity Verification - Testing in Sandbox | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/identity-verification/testing/index.html.md): Learn test values to ensure you always pass a session.
- [Identity Verification - Webhooks | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/identity-verification/webhooks/index.html.md): Subscribe to events and get real-time alerts for changes

## Documentation: Identity
- [Identity - Add Identity to your app | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/identity/add-to-app/index.html.md): Learn how to add Identity endpoints to your app. Identity lets you use user information such as names and addresses to verify users and reduce fraud.
- [Identity - Identity Document Upload | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/identity/identity-document-upload/index.html.md): Learn how to verify account ownership identity using bank statement uploads.
- [Identity - Introduction to Identity | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/identity/index.html.md): Verify users' account ownership and reduce fraud with the Identity product.

## Documentation: Income
- [Income - Add Income to your app | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/income/add-to-app/index.html.md): Learn how to add Plaid's Income endpoints to your application to obtain income information.
- [Income - Bank Income | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/income/bank-income/index.html.md): Learn about Bank Income features and implementation
- [Income - Document Income | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/income/document-income/index.html.md): Learn about Document Income features and implementation
- [Income - Introduction to Income | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/income/index.html.md): Optimize your income verification process with document, payroll, and bank-based Income verification
- [Income - Payroll Income | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/income/payroll-income/index.html.md): Learn about Payroll Income features and implementation

- [Investments Move - Introduction to Investments Move | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/investments-move/index.html.md): Automate ACATS and reduce rejections with broker-sourced data

## Documentation: Investments
- [Investments - Add Investments to your app | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/investments/add-to-app/index.html.md): Follow these instructions to add Investments endpoints to your application. Investments allows you to obtain information on securities and holdings.
- [Investments - Introduction to Investments | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/investments/index.html.md): View holdings and transactions from investment accounts

- [Launch checklist | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/launch-checklist/index.html.md): For a more robust Plaid integration, use this launch checklist, which consists of recommended pre-production steps for your Plaid app.

- [Layer - Add Plaid Layer to your app | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/layer/add-to-app/index.html.md): Learn how to add Plaid Layer to your application to provide a fast, frictionless onboarding experience
- [Layer - Introduction to Plaid Layer | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/layer/index.html.md): Onboard users instantly with just a phone number

## Documentation: Liabilities
- [Liabilities - Add Liabilities to your app | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/liabilities/add-to-app/index.html.md): Learn how to add Plaid's Liabilities endpoints to your application to obtain data from credit card, PayPal credit, and student loan accounts.
- [Liabilities - Introduction to Liabilities | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/liabilities/index.html.md): Access data for private student loans, mortgages, and credit cards using the Liabilities product.

## Documentation: Link
- [Link - Android | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/android/index.html.md): Learn how to integrate your app with the Link Android SDK. Link enables the connection of your app to financial institutions.
- [Link - Troubleshooting | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/android/troubleshooting/index.html.md): Troubleshooting the Plaid Android SDK
- [Link - Optimizing Link conversion | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/best-practices/index.html.md): Discover best practices for improving Link conversion
- [Link - Customizing Link | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/customization/index.html.md): Learn how to customize aspects of the Link UI for your app via the Plaid Dashboard. You can customize color schemes, text strings, Account Select panes, and more.
- [Link - Data Transparency Messaging migration | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/data-transparency-messaging-migration-guide/index.html.md): Learn how to enable and manage Data Transparency Messaging for your application.
- [Link - Preventing duplicate Items | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/duplicate-items/index.html.md): Learn how to identify and prevent duplicate Items. Identifying duplicate Items prevents excess billing and confusing application behavior.
- [Link - Embedded Link | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/embedded-institution-search/index.html.md): Enhance conversion by embedding institution search directly into your app.
- [Link - Handling an invalid Link Token | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/handle-invalid-link-token/index.html.md): Learn how to handle invalid Link tokens by catching the error in the onExit callback and re-fetching a new link_token for the next time the user opens Link
- [Link - Hosted Link for embedded clients | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/hosted-link/embedded-clients/index.html.md): Guide to Hosted Link for embedded clients
- [Link - Hosted Link | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/hosted-link/index.html.md): Learn how to build a backend-only Plaid integration by using Hosted Link for your frontend
- [Link - Overview | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/index.html.md): Use Plaid Link to connect to your users' financial accounts with the Plaid API. Link handles credential validation, MFA, errors, and more.
- [Link - Choosing when to initialize products | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/initializing-products/index.html.md): Increase conversion and reduce costs by learning how to configure products in Link
- [Link - Institution status in Link | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/institution-status/index.html.md): Learn how Link proactively notifies users if an institution's connection is responsible for an error.
- [Link - iOS | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/ios/index.html.md): Learn how to integrate your app with the Link iOS SDK. Link enables the connection of your app to financial institutions.
- [Link - Link Recovery (beta) | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/link-recovery/index.html.md): Link Recovery (beta) allows you to track the status of institution downtimes and notify users when they have been resolved
- [Link | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/link-token-migration-guide/index.html.md): Learn how to convert your app from the public_key to a new link_token to continue using the Plaid Link product.
- [Link - Link analytics and tracking | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/measuring-conversion/index.html.md): Learn how to measure Link conversion
- [Link - Pre-Link messaging | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/messaging/index.html.md): Maximize Link conversion and customer confidence with pre and post Link messaging
- [Link - Multi-Item Link | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/multi-item-link/index.html.md): Multi-Item Link allows users to connect accounts from multiple institutions in a single Link session
- [Link - OAuth guide | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/oauth/index.html.md): Configure Link to connect to institutions via OAuth, which redirects users to their bank's site to log in.
- [Link - React Native | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/react-native/index.html.md): Reference for integrating with the Link React Native SDK. Includes requirements, compatibility information, and steps for getting started.
- [Link - Returning user experience | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/returning-user/index.html.md): Learn about the Link returning user experience, which simplifies the onboarding experience for users who have already linked a financial institution with Plaid
- [Link - Troubleshooting | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/troubleshooting/index.html.md): Learn how to troubleshoot common errors associated with the Plaid Link flow
- [Link - Update mode | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/update-mode/index.html.md): Link's update mode allows you to fix Items requiring re-authentication, or for users to grant additional permissions on existing Items.
- [Link - Web | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/web/index.html.md): Use this guide to learn how to integrate with the Plaid Link JavaScript and React SDKs for web apps.
- [Link - Webview integrations | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/link/webview/index.html.md): Use this guide to learn how to integrate with the Link Webview JavaScript SDK

- [Monitor - Introduction to Monitor | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/monitor/index.html.md): Sanction, PEP, and watchlist screening for anti-money laundering compliance

- [Payments (Europe) | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/index.html.md): Initiate real-time payments for account funding and transfers

- [Payments (Europe) - Handling failed payments | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/payment-initiation-one-time/handling-failed-payments/index.html.md): Learn how to handle failed payments, implement retry strategies, and provide a good user experience.
- [Payments (Europe) - Payment Initiation | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/payment-initiation-one-time/index.html.md): Learn about making one-time payments (Single Immediate Payments) in Europe.
- [Payments (Europe) - Refunds | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/payment-initiation-one-time/refunds/index.html.md): Learn how to handle refunds for Payment Initiation transactions.
- [Payments (Europe) - User onboarding and account funding guide | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/payment-initiation-one-time/user-onboarding-and-account-funding/index.html.md): Set up an account linking flow that uses Plaid to connect your user's bank account. Then, use the obtained access token to improve account funding and withdrawals.
- [Payments (Europe) - Payment Status | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/payment-status/index.html.md): Learn how to verify payment status using webhooks and understand payment settlement times.
- [Payments (Europe) - Payments Dashboard | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/payments-dashboard/index.html.md): Monitor payment activity, manage virtual accounts, and generate reports
- [Payments (Europe) - Add Variable Recurring Payments to your app | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/variable-recurring-payments/add-to-app/index.html.md): Learn how to use Variable Recurring Payments (VRP) in your application
- [Payments (Europe) - Handling Failed Payments | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/variable-recurring-payments/handling-failed-payments/index.html.md): Learn how to handle failed payments, implement retry strategies, and provide a good user experience.
- [Payments (Europe) - Managing Consent | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/variable-recurring-payments/managing-consent/index.html.md): Learn how to track payment consent status and allow users to revoke consent
- [Payments (Europe) - Refunds | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/variable-recurring-payments/refunds/index.html.md): Learn how to process refunds for Variable Recurring Payments.
- [Payments (Europe) - Account Sweeping | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/virtual-accounts/account-sweeping/index.html.md): Sweep funds from your virtual account
- [Payments (Europe) - Add Virtual Accounts to your app | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/virtual-accounts/add-to-app/index.html.md): Use virtual accounts to gain additional insight and control over the flow of funds
- [Payments (Europe) - Handling Unexpected Payments | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/virtual-accounts/handling-unexpected-payments/index.html.md): Automatically refund unexpected bank transfers to virtual accounts
- [Payments (Europe) - Virtual Accounts and Payouts | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/virtual-accounts/index.html.md): Manage the entire lifecycle of a payment
- [Payments (Europe) - Managing your Virtual Account | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/virtual-accounts/managing-virtual-accounts/index.html.md): Set up, control, and monitor virtual account activity
- [Payments (Europe) - Payment Confirmation | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/virtual-accounts/payment-confirmation/index.html.md): Confirm when funds have settled in a virtual account
- [Payments (Europe) - Payouts | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/virtual-accounts/payouts/index.html.md): Send funds from your virtual account
- [Payments (Europe) - Refunds | Plaid Docs](https://plaid.com/docs/payment-initiation/virtual-accounts/refunds/index.html.md): Refund a Payment Initiation payment

- [How we handle your personal financial data](https://plaid.com/how-we-handle-data/): At Plaid, we don’t share your personal information without your permission, and we don’t sell or rent it to outside companies.
- [Plaid named a leader in IDV by IDC](https://plaid.com/idc-idv-leader-report-q4-2025/): Read why IDC named Plaid a leader in identity verification. Learn how Plaid helps fight fraud with adaptable, data-driven IDV & fraud intelligence solutions.
- [Increase conversion with Plaid](https://plaid.com/increase-conversion-with-plaid/): Find out how Plaid makes it easy to improve conversion and encourage use of your app or service.

- [Building a better financial future for all of us: Plaid’s 2023 snapshot](https://plaid.com/blog/year-in-review-2023/): In 2023, more people used fintech to take control of their money and safely connect to accounts than ever before. Learn how Plaid can help you grow in 2024.
- [A Q&A with Adam Moelis of Yotta](https://plaid.com/blog/yotta-qa/): How Yotta uses Plaid Signal to make funds available more quickly to their users, all while minimizing the risk of ACH returns.
- [YouLend offers a tech-first approach to SME financing](https://plaid.com/blog/youlend-customer-story/): Before Plaid, YouLend required prospective customers to upload bank statements. With Plaid, YouLend allows customers to apply for funding quickly and easily. 
- [Ziggma is leveling up portfolio management](https://plaid.com/blog/ziggma-customer-story/): With Plaid, Ziggma users can connect their accounts to take advantage of institutional-grade portfolio management tools, with monitoring and smart alerts.
- [Zilch unlocks new era of customer-first payments with Pay by Bank](https://plaid.com/blog/zilch-customer-announcement/): Zilch launches with Plaid, streamlining repayments for 5M+ users. Lower costs, better UX, and smarter payments—powered by Plaid’s open banking network.
- [Zirtue brings structure and accountability to friends-and-family lending](https://plaid.com/blog/zirtue/): 83% of Zirtue’s transactions involve smaller banks and credit unions. With Plaid, Zirtue users can connect with 11,642 American banks and credit unions.

## Check
- [Plaid Check Consumer Service Center](https://plaid.com/check/consumer-service-center/): Plaid Check Consumer Service Center 
- [Income & underwriting solutions for smarter lending](https://plaid.com/check/income-and-underwriting/): Accelerate income verification & underwriting with Plaid. Use real-time cash flow data & predictive insights to precisely assess credit risk. FCRA-compliant
- [LendScore: A smarter credit risk score with network insights](https://plaid.com/check/lendscore/): Combine cash flow and behavioral data to make faster, smarter credit decisions. Meet Plaid LendScore—the modern credit risk score for lending. Learn more.

## Customer Stories
- [Customer Success Stories](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/): Ever wonder what Plaid does? Meet some of our customers and discover the impact that partnering with Plaid can create.
- [Acorns - Financial wellness through faster onboarding](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/acorns/): Acorns uses Plaid to deliver fast, secure onboarding and help families build wealth through smarter, more accessible investing tools.
- [Addepar - Real-time visibility into financial holdings](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/addepar/): Addepar is a software platform for investment professionals. With Plaid, Addepar helps firms and investors create a more transparent financial system. 
- [AdminiPay: Scaling bank payments for home services pros](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/adminipay/): AdminiPay used Plaid to cut onboarding from weeks to minutes and lower payment costs by 75% with ACH and real-time payment visibility. Read the case study.
- [Advisors Mortgage - Faster underwriting & loan approvals](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/advisors-mortgage-group/): Advisors Mortgage streamlined underwriting with Plaid, reduced costs, improved borrower experience, and increased loan volume with faster approvals.
- [Adyen - A payments API platform for pay by bank](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/adyen/): Adyen's powerful financial technology brings payment solutions to businesses across the globe. Learn more about pay by bank with Adyen and Plaid.
- [Affirm: Digital lending with BNPL & real-time financial data](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/affirm/): Affirm empowers consumers and drives growth for business. Libor Michalek, President at Affirm, speaks about building honest financial products. Watch now.
- [Albert - Reducing fraud with smarter risk signals](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/albert/): Albert uses Plaid Protect to reduce fraud with network-level signals, improving risk decisions while maintaining a fast, low-friction user experience.
- [Alliant Credit Union - Benefits of open banking APIs](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/alliant-credit-union/): The benefits of open banking go beyond compliance. With Plaid, Alliant Credit Union uses open banking APIs for account verification, deposit growth, and more. 
- [Alto pharmacy - ACH payments for a better digital pharmacy](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/alto/): Alto is a digital pharmacy that makes medications more accessible. With Plaid, Alto offers ACH payments with reduced transaction fees. Learn more. 
- [Approve Owl - Auto loan decisioning & income verification](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/approve-owl/): Car buyers want a seamless customer experience for their auto loan. Learn how Approve Owl used Plaid to expedite the income verification process. 
- [Astra - Real-time spend data & seamless ACH transfers](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/astra/): Astra makes personal finance more intelligent and empowering. With Plaid, their customers can link credit cards and bank accounts in a matter of seconds.
- [Atom Finance - Accessible investing with linked accounts](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/atom-finance/): Atom Finance needed a way for users to link their different investment accounts to the app. Plaid now connects to more than 95% of US investment accounts.
- [Ava: Expanding credit access with behavioral underwriting](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/ava-finance/): Ava uses Plaid to underwrite with financial behaviors instead of credit scores—helping underserved users build credit and avoid high-cost debt.
- [Banxa: Crypto identity verification & KYC solutions](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/banxa/): Onramps are a vital part of the crypto ecosystem, and require streamlined onboarding. Learn how Banxa uses Plaid for crypto identity verification and KYC.
- [Benny & Forrester: Optimizing digital onboarding](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/benny-and-forrester/): Learn how Benny and Forrester improved digital onboarding with Plaid by reducing dropoff, detecting fraud, and building user trust at scale.
- [Betterment - Boost users lifetime value & drive engagement](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/betterment/): With Plaid, Betterment grows the lifetime value of users, enabling 91% to maintain a higher median account balance.
- [BlueVine - Small business loans & financing with Plaid](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/bluevine/): Small businesses increasingly turn to fintechs for loans. BlueVine shares how Plaid speeds up the application and onboarding process. Read more. 
- [Branch - Instant payments with connected apps & accounts](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/branch/): How Branch uses Plaid to give workers connectivity to the apps and services they love
- [Brex – Dynamic credit underwriting with real-time bank data](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/brex/): Plaid helps Brex streamline credit decisions with live bank data—enhancing customer experience, automation, and underwriting accuracy. Learn more.

- [Customer Success Stories - Zip](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/zip/): With Plaid, Zip automates essential compliance work, securing the shopping experience for millions of customers.
- [Zirtue - Peer-to-peer lending with seamless bank connections](https://plaid.com/customer-stories/zirtue/): Zirtue’s lending transactions often involve smaller banks and credit unions. With Plaid, Zirtue users can connect with 11,642 American banks and credit unions.

## Events
- [Events hub - Fintech events online & in-person](https://plaid.com/events/): Find the latest events in fintech happening online or in-person near you. Browse upcoming events with Plaid in fintech, fraud, payments, and beyond.
- [1033 compliance simplified: A tech talk on open banking](https://plaid.com/events/1033-compliance-simplified-tech-talk/): With the new 1033 rule, a new era of open banking is here. Watch insights from our in-house panel of experts in this tech talk on 1033 compliance. 
- [2022 fintech predictions with Zach Perret](https://plaid.com/events/2022-fintech-predictions-tech-talk/): Join us for our first Tech Talk of the year with our CEO Zach Perret to discuss some of the biggest fintech trends from 2021 and predictions for the year ahead.
- [2023 Fintech Predictions with Zach Perret](https://plaid.com/events/2023-fintech-predictions-tech-talk/): Join us for a Tech Talk with Zach Perret, Co-Founder & CEO of Plaid as he discuss some of the biggest fintech trends and predictions for 2023.
- [2024 Fintech Predictions with Zach Perret](https://plaid.com/events/2024-fintech-predictions-tech-talk/): Every year, Plaid looks into the trends shaping digital finance. Watch Zach Perret, Co-Founder and CEO of Plaid, to see what 2024 has in store.
- [Account Select pane workshop](https://plaid.com/events/Account-Select-pane-workshop/): During this workshop, we’ll share more about Account Select pane updates and conduct a technical deep dive so you can learn more about what this means for you.
- [Section 1033: Open banking regulation with American Banker](https://plaid.com/events/american-banker-1033-regulation-webinar/): Banking regulation changes are coming. Hear from industry experts on the upcoming Section 1033 rulemaking and its impact on open banking regulation
- [Unlocking cash flow insights: Plaid & Experian webinar](https://plaid.com/events/american-banker-experian-unlocking-cash-flow-insights/): Plaid & Experian discuss cash flow data and its role in lending with American Banker. Learn how lenders can use cash flow data to expand credit. Watch now.
- [Plaid & MANTL: Combating AI-driven fraud](https://plaid.com/events/american-banker-mantl-ai-driven-fraud/): Plaid & MANTL unpack AI-driven fraud with American Banker. Learn how banks can stop synthetic IDs & account takeover with network-wide intelligence.
- [Build smart defenses against evolving fraud: Aspen Institute](https://plaid.com/events/aspen-institute-combat-against-fraud-tech-talk/): Join Aspen Institute and Plaid to learn how banks can combat evolving fraud through technology and collaboration. Watch for key insights and solutions.
- [How to build an investment platform customers love](https://plaid.com/events/betterment-tech-talk/): Learn how to offer personalized recommendations, actionable insights, and a seamless user experience that will keep customers coming back for more
- [Breaking Banks podcast - Pay by Bank with Adyen & Plaid](https://plaid.com/events/breaking-banks-pay-by-bank/): More customers are ready to pay by bank throughout the US. Hear more about bank payments from experts at Plaid & Adyen on this episode of Breaking Banks.
- [Building a business case for pay by bank: Tech talk](https://plaid.com/events/business-case-for-pay-by-bank/): Build a business case for pay by bank. Learn how to reduce payment processing fees and accept bank payments online in this webinar with Forrester and Adyen.
- [Canada Open Banking Roundtable Webinar](https://plaid.com/events/canada-open-banking-roundtable-webinar/): Join Plaid and Canadian policy experts for a discussion on what’s next for Open Banking in Canada and the opportunities ahead. 
- [Lend smarter with cash flow underwriting - Datos Insights](https://plaid.com/events/datos-insights-future-of-lending-tech-talk/): Unlock the future of lending with cash flow data. Cash flow insights can improve outcomes and expand financial inclusion. Watch our webinar to learn more.

## For Consumers
- [Fraud protection & bank account monitoring for consumers](https://plaid.com/for-consumers/bank-account-monitoring/): Be the first to know if your money’s at risk. Plaid monitors your bank accounts for suspicious activity and sends real-time alerts to stop fraud early.

## Industries
- [Trusted financial infrastructure for AI companies](https://plaid.com/industries/ai/): Plaid provides identity verification, bank payments, fraud prevention & real-time data for AI companies to build secure, intelligent experiences.
- [Auto loan income verification & API solutions](https://plaid.com/industries/auto/): Auto buyers expect quick decisioning and a seamless UX. Transform your auto lending experience with APIs built to verify identity, income, and move money.
- [Plaid for banks & credit unions - Digital banking solutions](https://plaid.com/industries/banks-credit-unions/): Grow deposits, increase funding, and fight fraud. With Plaid, banks and credit unions can open and fund more accounts while reducing fraud and returns. 
- [Bill pay platform & recurring payment API solutions](https://plaid.com/industries/billing-recurring-payments/): Prevent failed payments from the start. Explore ACH bill pay solutions that help modernize the payment experience and prevent fraud. Learn more.
- [Credit underwriting & risk decisioning software solutions](https://plaid.com/industries/consumer-lending/): Build credit decisioning software that transforms lending. Plaid’s APIs streamline onboarding, credit risk analysis, and underwriting. Learn more.
- [Gaming payment solutions, KYC compliance & player onboarding](https://plaid.com/industries/gaming/): Simplify gaming payment processing, speed up player onboarding, and stay KYC and AML compliant. Discover how Plaid powers secure payments for gaming companies.
- [Government payments & fraud prevention for the public sector](https://plaid.com/industries/government-public-sector/): Explore digital transformation for state and local government with Plaid. Enable secure ACH payments, identity verification, and fraud prevention. Learn more.
- [Healthcare payment solutions & financial fraud prevention](https://plaid.com/industries/healthcare/): Take healthcare financial infrastructure to the next level. Reduce fraud, improve payment reliability, and support eligibility decisions with Plaid.
- [Modern insurance payments & underwriting](https://plaid.com/industries/insurance/): Modernize claims, payments, and underwriting with Plaid. Prevent fraud, verify accounts instantly, and power digital insurance experiences from quote to claim.
- [Mortgage underwriting & asset verification for lenders](https://plaid.com/industries/mortgage/): Approve more qualified home buyers. Learn how leading lenders use Plaid to onboard customers, reduce fraud, verify assets, & streamline the mortgage process.
- [Platform & marketplace onboarding & payment API solutions](https://plaid.com/industries/platforms-marketplaces/): Manage onboarding, payments, and payouts for platforms and marketplaces. Plaid helps verify sellers instantly and deliver reliable payouts. Learn more.
- [Tenant screening & rent payments for property management](https://plaid.com/industries/property-management/): Streamline rent collection, tenant onboarding & income verification with Plaid’s property management solutions. Reduce friction & fraud. Learn more.

- [Gr4vy - No-code payment orchestration platform integration](https://plaid.com/partners/gr4vy/): Learn how Plaid and Gr4vy help businesses streamline payment orchestration. Increase conversion, reduce fraud, and drive profitability with Gr4vy & Plaid. 
- [ICE Mortgage Technology - Loan origination system automation](https://plaid.com/partners/ice-mortgage-technology/): Verify assets faster, right inside Encompass. Learn how Plaid and Encompass improve the digital mortgage experience and unlock better conversion.
- [Mantl: Digital account opening & instant onboarding](https://plaid.com/partners/mantl/): Complicated onboarding can cost you customers. Learn how Mantl delivers seamless account opening, instant onboarding, and KYC compliance with Plaid.
- [MeridianLink & Plaid: Online account opening software & API](https://plaid.com/partners/meridianlink/): Plaid & MeridianLink deliver seamless account opening experiences with instant verification. Learn how to power fast, secure onboarding & account linking.
- [Q2 - Digital banking solutions for banks & credit unions](https://plaid.com/partners/q2/): Power smarter financial experiences with Q2 and Plaid. Learn how banks and credit unions use Q2's digital banking platform for payments, lending, and more. 
- [Taktile - Credit underwriting & risk decisioning](https://plaid.com/partners/taktile/): Lenders can unlock new opportunities and grow customer approvals. Build personalized credit solutions and go to market with Taktile and Plaid. Learn more.
- [Xactus - Mortgage asset & income verification](https://plaid.com/partners/xactus/): Approve more borrowers with less paperwork with Xactus & Plaid. Verify income and employment in seconds and enable smarter mortgage decisions. Learn more.

## Products
- [Plaid products - Financial APIs & connections for fintech](https://plaid.com/products/): Plaid enables fintech solutions for all companies--from payments and fraud to connectivity and credit. Learn more about Plaid products & start building.
- [App Directory - Insights on customer app connections](https://plaid.com/products/app-directory/): Plaid's App Directory provides a streamlined dashboard with insights on up-to-date customer connections to help manage risk and compliance. Learn more. 
- [Assets - Asset verification software - check & verify assets](https://plaid.com/products/assets/): Reduce reliance on manual document uploads and reviews. Verify assets and account ownership directly from the source with Plaid assets. Learn more.
- [Auth - Instant bank account verification API](https://plaid.com/products/auth/): Plaid's Auth API product allows companies to instantly authenticate bank accounts for payments and set up ACH transfers from any bank.
- [Balance API - verify bank account balance](https://plaid.com/products/balance/): Plaid's Balance API allows companies to verify real-time account balances. Protect against overdraft and NSF fees.
- [Beacon - The anti-fraud network for fintech](https://plaid.com/products/beacon/): Beacon leverages the power of the Plaid network to stop the proliferation of identity fraud in its tracks. Protect your users and fight fraud with Beacon.
- [Enrich - Data enrichment and transaction categorization API](https://plaid.com/products/enrich/): Enrich brings clarity to the transaction data generated from your banking products, or from non-Plaid sources. Enhancements include merchant, category, and location insights.
- [Identity Verification - Global IDV to Ensure KYC Compliance](https://plaid.com/products/identity-verification/): Verify your users’ identities, around the world. Ensure know your customer (KYC) and customer due diligence (CDD) compliance while improving conversion rates.
- [Identity API - Verify & match user account ownership](https://plaid.com/products/identity/): Plaid’s Identity API allows companies to verify and match user account ownership, all with just a few lines of code. Find out how.
- [Income - Income & Employment Verification API](https://plaid.com/products/income/): Plaid's Income product offers a seamless integration to help verify income and employment. Learn more about our secure employment and income verification.
- [Investments Move: Fast, secure brokerage transfers](https://plaid.com/products/investments-move/): Plaid’s Investments Move helps brokerages automate asset transfers, reduce rejections, and improve conversion with broker-sourced data.
- [Investment API - retrieve investment data](https://plaid.com/products/investments/): Plaid's Investments API allows companies to build a holistic view of a user's investment accounts, including account balances, holdings, and transactions.
- [Liabilities API - Verify debt and loan data](https://plaid.com/products/liabilities/): Access detailed loan data all with a simple endpoint. Liabilities helps you retrieve details on major debts, like credit cards, and mortgages.
- [Monitor Watchlist Screening - Easy AML and PEP Compliance](https://plaid.com/products/monitor/): Reduce fraud, ensure compliance, and save time on manual reviews with Monitor anti-money laundering and politically exposed person watchlist screening. 
- [Permissions Manager - permissions management API](https://plaid.com/products/permissions-manager/): Help your users manage all of their connections to Plaid-powered apps with a custom consumer permissions portal. Build better with Plaid. 
- [Protect - Real-time fraud detection & risk scoring](https://plaid.com/products/protect/): Prevent fraud, not growth. Get a real-time fraud score at any step of the user journey with Plaid Protect. Learn how to reduce fraud without friction.
- [Signal - ACH Risk Assessment & Scoring API](https://plaid.com/products/signal/): Signal - a machine learning risk engine - assesses and predicts the risk of an ACH return. Learn more about Signal, ACH return risk and fraud management.
- [Transactions API - Bank account history & credit card data](https://plaid.com/products/transactions/): Transactions is a simple API that helps companies get comprehensive transaction data from thousands of banks and financial institutions. Learn more.
- [Transfer - A complete bank transfer API - ACH, RTP & FedNow](https://plaid.com/products/transfer/): Transfer helps users move money quickly and securely on the rail of their choice. Simplify bank transfers and improve performance with a single powerful API.

## Resources
- [Industry Guides - Insights and Trends](https://plaid.com/resources/): Plaid's Industry Resources provide an in-depth look at the world of digital finance. Gain insights and learn about trends shaping the fintech industry and more.
- [ACH Payments 101 – How ACH works for businesses](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/ach-payments-guide/): Learn how ACH payments work, key benefits, and how Plaid enables fast, secure bank transfers with account verification and fraud prevention tools.
- [ACH processing 101: All you need to process ACH payments](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/ach-processing/): Learn everything you need to know about how ACH processing works, including processing times and essential strategies to streamline payments.
- [ACH return codes: What they mean and how to minimize risk](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/ach-return/): ACH payments are not without risk. Understand what ACH return codes mean and how to protect your organization from fraud. 
- [ACH Risk: How to assess ACH payment risk and reduce returns](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/ach-risk/): ACH comes with risks, especially for fraud and returns. Learn how assessing ACH risk can help prevent returns and save your company money.
- [ACH vs credit cards: The benefits of ACH for business](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/ach-vs-credit-cards/): Many businesses don’t realize that ACH can provide many benefits as an alternative to credit cards. Here’s what to consider when evaluating ACH vs credit cards. 
- [ACH vs wire transfer. 7 key differences](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/ach-vs-wire-transfers/): Learn how ACH and wire transfers differ in terms of speed, settlement, cost, size, and more. Plus, find out how they’re both changing in the future. 
- [How does an ACH deposit work? A behind the scenes look](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/how-does-an-ach-deposit-work/): Find out all you need to know about ACH deposits, including how they work, how long they take, and how they measure up against other types of payments.
- [What is an ACH Transfer? All about ACH bank transfers](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/how-does-an-ach-transfer-work/): Gain a deeper understanding of the ins and outs of ACH transfers, including how long they should take and how much they should cost.
- [ACH insights and trends - Resources](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/): The Automated Clearing House (ACH) is one of the fastest growing payment rails today. Learn the ins and outs of the popular payments network.
- [2026 Readiness Check for Nacha Fraud Monitoring Rule Changes](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/nacha-rule-changes/): As ACH volumes rise, fraud monitoring needs to evolve. Nacha is setting new rules around ACH fraud monitoring in 2026. Check your readiness with our self-assessment. 
- [ACH insights and trends - Resources](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/page/2/): The Automated Clearing House (ACH) is one of the fastest growing payment rails today. Learn the ins and outs of the popular payments network.
- [ACH insights and trends - Resources](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/search/): The Automated Clearing House (ACH) is one of the fastest growing payment rails today. Learn the ins and outs of the popular payments network.
- [How to accept ACH payments and increase customer adoption](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/ways-to-get-customers-to-pay-with-ach/): Accepting ACH payments can mean significant savings for your business. Here’s how to encourage your customers to make the switch.
- [What is ACH credit, and how does it work?](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/what-is-ach-credit/): Learn exactly what ACH credits are, how they work, and how they differ from other types of payments, including ACH debits.
- [What is an ACH debit? The complete rundown](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/what-is-ach-debit/): Discover the inner workings of ACH debits, including how they operate, the different types of ACH debits, and better ways to use them.  
- [What is ACH? The ultimate guide to ACH payments](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/what-is-ach/): Learn about what ACH is, how ACH payments work, and what the future has in store for the ACH network
- [What is direct debit? Examining the ACH 'auto-pay’ tool](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/what-is-direct-debit/): Discover how the popular ACH direct debit tool works for regularly recurring payments, plus find out it’s benefits and drawbacks.
- [What is Nacha and is your business compliant?](https://plaid.com/resources/ach/what-is-nacha/): Learn about the ACH network’s governing body, what their rules are, and what you can do to keep your business in compliance.
- [AI in financial services: The rise of intelligent finance](https://plaid.com/resources/ai/artificial-intelligence-in-financial-services/): Explore how AI in financial services is helping businesses deliver more personalized user experiences while reducing fraud and risk.
- [Artificial intelligence in financial services](https://plaid.com/resources/ai/): Articles and other resources on artificial intelligence in financial services and the rise of intelligent finance
- [Artificial intelligence in financial services](https://plaid.com/resources/ai/search/): Articles and other resources on artificial intelligence in financial services and the rise of intelligent finance
- [Account numbers: What they mean and how to find them](https://plaid.com/resources/banking/account-numbers-explained/): Learn what the numbers associated with your bank account, credit card, and debit card mean and how to identify them with your financial institution.
- [Authentication vs. authorization: Knowing the difference](https://plaid.com/resources/banking/authentication-vs-authorization/): Learn all about authentication versus authorization—two distinct yet related components of account access.
- [Bank account verification guide: What it is and how it works](https://plaid.com/resources/banking/bank-account-verification-guide/): Learn how bank account verification works and how to verify accounts instantly with Plaid’s Auth API. Explore methods like Instant Auth and micro-deposits.
- [4 best practices to become your customers' primary account](https://plaid.com/resources/banking/become-your-customers-primary-account/): Becoming your customer’s primary account often starts with earning their direct deposit. Here’s how to motivate customers to switch.
- [3 ways banks can help customers improve financial health](https://plaid.com/resources/banking/financial-health-opportunity-banks/): How financial institutions can increase their bottom line by offering products and services that help customers improve their financial health. 
- [Banking insights and trends - Resources](https://plaid.com/resources/banking/): What consumers expect from their financial service providers is changing faster than ever. Stay ahead of the curve by giving your customers what they want.
- [How open banking helps small and regional banks thrive](https://plaid.com/resources/banking/open-banking-community-banks/): Open banking empowers small and regional banks to grow deposits, modernize lending, reduce fraud, and deliver faster payments—all while building trust.

- [What KYC is and why it matters in financial services](https://plaid.com/resources/banking/what-is-kyc/): KYC procedures are required to help prevent financial crimes. Learn how KYC helps you verify a customer’s identity and identify their risk factors.
- [What is open banking? A guide to the future of finance](https://plaid.com/resources/banking/what-is-open-banking/): Open banking is transforming finance. With secure, real-time data sharing, unlock faster payments, smarter lending, and better financial control. Read more.

- [eKYC: Digital verification improves new customer onboarding](https://plaid.com/resources/compliance/eKYC/): Electronic Know Your customer (eKYC) is improving security, delivering a better user experience, and making it easier to meet AML requirements. 
- [Enhanced due diligence: What is EDD in banking?](https://plaid.com/resources/compliance/enhanced-due-diligence/): Enhanced due diligence is required for customers flagged as high-risk. Learn more about enhanced due diligence and how EDD is used in banking.

## Solutions
- [Fraud detection & risk management solutions for KYC & AML](https://plaid.com/solutions/fraud/): Plaid helps businesses of all sizes fight fraud and risk with smarter data. Learn more about our fraud prevention & risk management solution.
- [Digital onboarding API solutions for bank account data](https://plaid.com/solutions/onboarding/): Streamline digital onboarding with Plaid. Improve conversion, reduce friction, and securely connect to bank account data in seconds. Learn more.
- [Open finance solutions - Financial access data connectivity](https://plaid.com/solutions/open-finance/): Take the next step in your open finance journey. Enable secure data connectivity with industry-aligned solutions designed for compliance. Learn more. 
- [Payment solutions - secure payment processing for businesses](https://plaid.com/solutions/payments/): Plaid's payment solutions help businesses onboard customers and move money safely and securely. Learn how Plaid helps make payments safer, faster, and easier.
- [Personal finance management APIs](https://plaid.com/solutions/personal-financial-management/): Build PFM software that meets the needs of consumers. Plaid's APIs can help with onboarding, risk management, and account ownership. Learn more.

## Tools
- [ACH Savings Calculator - Lower payment processing fees](https://plaid.com/tools/ach-savings-calculator/): Estimate how much your business can save on card fees by switching to pay by bank with Plaid. Lower costs, boost margins, & improve payment success with ACH.
- [Calculate mortgage savings from digital asset verification](https://plaid.com/tools/digital-mortgage-roi-calculator/): Estimate the ROI of switching from manual asset verification to digital VoA. See how Plaid helps lenders reduce costs and qualify more loans.

## Use Cases
- [Bank Account Onboarding - Plaid](https://plaid.com/use-cases/banking-and-brokerage/account-onboarding/): The technology layer for financial services"
- [Business finances - financial data solutions](https://plaid.com/use-cases/business-finances/): From bookkeeping to payroll, business finance processes are complex experiences for employees and customers alike. Plaid makes them easy for everyone.
- [Business financial management - transaction data API for BFM](https://plaid.com/use-cases/business-financial-management/): Automate bookkeeping & get real-time views of cash flow with business-specific transaction data. Learn how Plaid enables business financial management.
- [Crypto - Onboarding & funding solutions for crypto accounts](https://plaid.com/use-cases/crypto/): Plaid gives developers everything they need to build secure crypto onramp all with a single integration. Onboard users safely and securely with Plaid.
- [Earned wage access - solutions for EWA providers](https://plaid.com/use-cases/earned-wage-access/): Earned wage access lets employees access wages early in times of need. Learn how Plaid enables EWA with onboarding, decisioning, & money movement.
- [Fraud prevention - real-time risk detection & identity tools](https://plaid.com/use-cases/fraud-and-risk-prevention/): Stop more fraud and approve more good users with Plaid’s fraud & risk prevention platform—powered by network intelligence and real-time risk scoring.
- [Inbound bank payments with instant verification](https://plaid.com/use-cases/inbound-bank-payments/): Accept bank payments with Plaid using instant verification and risk checks. Improve inbound bank payments with higher conversion, lower costs, & fewer failures.
- [Instant onboarding & identity verification solutions](https://plaid.com/use-cases/instant-onboarding-identity-verification/): Onboard more customers instantly with Plaid. Verify identities, reduce fraud, and meet KYC/AML compliance—all in seconds with a single integration.
- [KYC & AML Compliance Automation](https://plaid.com/use-cases/kyc-aml-compliance/): Automate KYC and AML compliance with Plaid. Verify users, screen for sanctions, and reduce manual reviews with fast, scalable compliance tools.
- [Lending Guide - Plaid](https://plaid.com/use-cases/lending/guide/): Streamline and automate your lending process
- [Lending & Mortgage API Solutions](https://plaid.com/use-cases/lending/): Plaid helps lenders make informed loan decisions with a summary of a borrower's data to verify assets, income, and identity.
- [Open finance - Secure open banking APIs & data sharing](https://plaid.com/use-cases/open-finance/): Build on FDX standards for secure, reliable, and transparent data sharing. Connect your customers to 10,000+ apps with Plaid’s Open Finance API.
- [Outbound Bank Payments - Instant, Reliable Payouts](https://plaid.com/use-cases/outbound-bank-payments/): Send instant reliable payouts with Plaid. Verify users in real time, reduce failed payments, cut costs, & route payouts across ACH, RTP, & FedNow automatically.
- [Personal Finances: Get Started - Plaid](https://plaid.com/use-cases/personal-finances/get-started/): Learn how Plaid&apos;s suite of products can take your app to the next level
- [Personal finance management API - PFM tools & use cases](https://plaid.com/use-cases/personal-finances/): Bring personalized insights to your PFM tools. Help consumers transform their financial health with Plaid's tools & APIs for personal finances. Learn more. 
- [Personal Financial Insights API for PFM & Banking Apps](https://plaid.com/use-cases/personal-financial-insights/): Deliver real-time insights with Plaid. Access transaction, investment, & debt data with enrichment, categorization, & aggregation APIs for PFM. Learn more.
- [Wealth management API - tools & solutions for investments](https://plaid.com/use-cases/wealth/): Grow wealth without growing your software stack. Fund accounts, manage risk, and deliver personalized insights to your investments customers. Learn more. 

## Whats New
- [Building network-powered financial products - Fall 2024](https://plaid.com/whats-new/fall-2024/): From onboarding to underwriting, the Plaid network helps customers grow and drive innovation. See what's new in our Fall 2024 Product Update. 
- [Deep dive into LendScore: A new aspect in credit risk scores](https://plaid.com/whats-new/fall-2025/credit-deep-dive/): Discover LendScore, our new credit risk score built on cash-flow insights. LendScore helps improve accuracy, reduce risk, and make fairer credit decisions.
- [Deep dive into Protect Ti2: A machine learning fraud score](https://plaid.com/whats-new/fall-2025/fraud-deep-dive/): Discover Protect Ti2, Plaid's latest machine learning fraud model built on signals fraudsters can’t fake, from device behavior to cross-network intelligence.
- [Smarter fraud detection & alternative credit data: Fall 2025](https://plaid.com/whats-new/fall-2025/): From fighting fraud to data-driven credit decisioning, learn how Plaid products are shaping the future of finance. Find out what’s new in Fall 2025.
- [Deep dive into Transfer for Platforms: Embedded SaaS payment](https://plaid.com/whats-new/fall-2025/transfer-for-platform-deep-dive/): Discover how Transfer for Platforms helps SaaS companies embed seamless bank payments, cut costs, and boost revenue through a simple integration. Learn more.
- [Plaid payments - What's new in money movement - Spring 2024](https://plaid.com/whats-new/spring-2024/): Missed payments mean missed revenue. Merchants can onboard customers, lower return risk, and move money instantly with Plaid. See what's new in Spring 2024.
